title: pyrethrum oppositifolium
intro: Pyrethrum oppositifolium, also known as Chinese pyrethrum or pyrethrum chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to China and Japan. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum oppositifolium include its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum oppositifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including respiratory infections, skin irritations, and digestive issues.
